label: Life stage work settings
description: Minimum biological age at which a pawn may perform a work type. Loaded via LoadDataFromXmlCustom: the XML element name is the WorkTypeDef defName and the text content is the minimum age in years.

workType.label: Work type
workType.description: WorkTypeDef that these age restrictions apply to.

minAge.label: Min age
minAge.description: Minimum biological age in years at which the pawn may perform this work type.
